title: V1.1 Architecture Alignment Blockers (TD-1~TD-6)
notes: TD-1 (sync wiring) done (c5f27d8). TD-2, TD-3 done (b349201, 8dc8163). TD-4: domain/sync/CLI/daemon aligned with generated enums; build+clippy+tests green (677877f). Remaining: TD-5 (canonical_hash), TD-6 (User aggregate). Run pnpm codegen if schemas touched; TS drift check before merge.

metadata.description: Resolve 6 Critical+High tech debt items from architecture alignment review: TD-1 (sync wiring), TD-2 (WorldStatus enum), TD-3 (MembershipStatus enum), TD-4 (JSON Schema enum typing), TD-5 (canonical_hash), TD-6 (User aggregate). Grouped into 4 task batches by technical domain and dependency order.
metadata.scope: TD-1 through TD-6; enum alignment, schema codegen, sync wiring, domain models
